options.name: --version
options.description: Display the program version and exit

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Do not echo informational messages to standard output

options.name: --silent
options.description: Same as --quiet but also suppresses user generated log messages

options.name: --nakefile
options.description: Use FILE as the Nake project file

options.name: --directory
options.description:
Use DIR as current directory
--runner NAME      Use NAME as runner file name in task listing

options.name: --trace
options.description:
Enables task execution tracing and full stack traces in exception messages
--debug            Enables full script debugging in Visual Studio

options.name: --framework
options.description: Specify .net framework version to use (eg, netcoreapp6.0)

options.name: --tasks
options.description: Display the tasks with descriptions matching optional PATTERN and exit
